title: Outcrop bucket file (v0.4)
description: v0.4 bucket-file schema. Describes one storage bucket within a collection directory: its backend, role, posture (terms/sensitivity/publication defaults from collection.yaml, only-tighten allowed), prefixes[], bucket-scoped facts[], and mirrors[] (bucket-scoped replicas/alternate access paths). The filename stem must equal the bucket field. additionalProperties:false throughout. Cross-field rules enforced by scripts/validate_registry.py.

copy.description: Length-tier copy block with required text field. Populate only tiers with genuinely distinct hand-authored content; never repeat a value across label/headline/lede/text tiers. The validator warns on redundant tiers. Renderer fallback chains: label→[label,headline,text]; headline→[headline,lede,text]; lede→[lede,text,headline]; text→[text,lede]. locale is dropped (en-only).

prefixCopy.description: Copy block on a prefix item. text is not required — a label-only entry is valid. Populate only tiers with genuinely distinct hand-authored content; never repeat a value across label/headline/lede/text. The validator warns on redundant tiers.

license.description: Primary license identity as an SPDX expression (e.g. 'MIT', 'CC-BY-4.0', 'ODbL-1.0') or an SPDX sentinel ('NOASSERTION' when terms are unverified/mixed, 'NONE' when no license applies). Set to NOASSERTION when the precise license cannot be confirmed from sources. Preferred over license_spdx_id for new records.

license_spdx_id.description: Deprecated alias for license. Use the license field for new records; this field is kept for compatibility with existing records.

drift.description: Drift policy for an expected_count. Use warn_above_pct for percentage-based drift.

extent.description: Geographic and temporal extent of the dataset or prefix. Registry-supplied enrichment for what the engine cannot derive. No CRS field — extents are always WGS-84 bounding boxes.

bbox.description: Bounding box [west, south, east, north] in WGS-84 decimal degrees, or an array of bounding boxes for non-contiguous regions.

temporal.description: Temporal extent as [start|null, end|null] RFC 3339 date or datetime strings.

fact.description: A source-backed editorial annotation. Subject is determined by nesting position (top-level facts[] = bucket-scoped; prefixes[].facts[] = prefix-scoped). No applies_to or level fields.

scope.description: Propagation scope. 'inherited' cascades to descendant prefixes; 'exact' renders only at this subject; 'related' renders at related pages.

also.description: Additional same-file prefixes this fact attaches to.

prefix.description: A per-prefix annotation item. prefix is a relative path (no leading slash, trailing slash required, no s3://bucket/ prefix). Relative to this bucket file's bucket.

Relative prefix path: no leading slash, trailing slash required (e.g. 'events/', 'crawl-data/CC-MAIN-*/'). Wildcard grammar: * one segment, ** zero-or-more segments, {a,b,c} alternation, key=* Hive partition.

kind.description: Optional editorial kind — descriptive only, no structural authority. Omit on leaf tables — engine classifies them; author kind only on containers.

inherit.description: When true, this entry's SUBTREE-METADATA (refs, terms, declared_by, coverage, confidence, tags) cascades to descendant prefixes as a fallback. `description` (copy) is NOT cascaded — it stays local to the prefix that declares it.

boundary.description: pin = engine missed a boundary here; exclude = engine wrongly emitted one. Absent = trust the engine.

mirror.description: A bucket-scoped replica, mirror, or alternate access path for the content of this specific bucket. Shape reuses the non-bucket-location fields: id, backend, role, and access details. Facts nested here are scoped to this mirror entry. Placement rule: a mirror/replica of THIS bucket's content goes here; an access path spanning multiple buckets or a publisher portal/DOI not tied to one bucket goes in collection.yaml source.locations[].

superseded_by.description: ID of the location/mirror that supersedes this mirror entry.

facts.description: Facts whose subject is this specific mirror entry. The mirror's page_facts (e.g. 'start here for live data') nest here.

bucket.description: Bucket name. Must equal the filename stem (e.g. file gdelt-open-data.yaml → bucket: gdelt-open-data).

outcrop_bucket.description: Optional. The Outcrop/engine bucket identity (the ingested DB bucket slug) for this location, used when it differs from the real S3 `bucket` name — e.g. multiple products packed by prefix into one shared S3 bucket, each ingested as a distinct Outcrop bucket. When absent, the Outcrop bucket name defaults to `bucket`.

title.description: Optional per-bucket display title. When present, overrides the collection title on this bucket's page (e.g. 'OpenAlex — MAG format' for a secondary bucket that holds a distinct format). Falls back to the collection title when absent.

prefix.description: Optional bucket-internal prefix this product was ingested FROM (re-ingestion provenance; bucket: holds the real S3 bucket). Row keys/prefixes[] are full bucket-relative paths and are NOT relative to it — it is not prepended.

superseded_by.description: ID of the location that supersedes this bucket.

declared_by.description: Bucket-wide default declared_by value. Inherited by prefix items that do not carry their own declared_by. Set this when all (or most) prefixes in the bucket share the same provenance.

refs.description: Bucket-local refs that supplement the collection-level refs pool. A ref id must not duplicate any id already declared in the collection's collection.yaml refs.

facts.description: Bucket-scoped facts. Facts here apply to this bucket (use scope: inherited for bucket-wide propagation to all prefixes).

mirrors.description: Bucket-scoped mirrors, replicas, or alternate access paths for this bucket's content (HTTP mirrors, FTP, BigQuery representations, differently-named replica buckets, etc.). Placement rule: if the access path serves THIS bucket's content specifically, place it here. If it spans multiple buckets or is a publisher portal/DOI not tied to one bucket, place it in collection.yaml source.locations[].

prefixes.description: Per-prefix annotations with relative paths (relative to this bucket).
